reason: The deterministic sensor-to-state loop and audit logging completed successfully.
The segment is only 0.75 seconds and contains no dynamic actor.
Lateral RGB views contain visible reconstruction blur and smearing.
Semantic and depth outputs have numerical sanity checks but no pixel-level cross-modal validation.
claims_supported: The public scene can run through a bounded deterministic HUGSIM closed loop on this machine.
State, observation, plan, action, geometry, and metric evidence can be collected.
claims_not_supported: Dynamic actor insertion and occlusion are credible.
Collision or near-miss outcomes can be attributed to an AD agent rather than simulator artifacts.
